workContext.summary: Brian Mauck is Head of Capital Markets at Jeeves Financial Technology, running capital markets and credit data science. Work spans lender negotiations, analytics, ML, and structured credit. Key tools: Taktile, Redshift, Metabase, python-pptx, loc_tape, Linear, DeerFlow, LangGraph, Airflow.

personalContext.summary: Direct, zero tolerance for hallucination or unauthorized work. No Drive links — attach files directly. Trackers must be Google Sheets. Never send messages without explicit go-ahead. No workarounds; fix root causes.

recentMonths.summary: Brian is managing two active capital markets facilities (US Bridge and MX SOFOM, June 21 BB showing $8.7M deficiency) while driving Vista diligence closure with Goodwin, NB, and Kroll across hedging policy, bank accounts, and Brazil/FCPA docs. PwC FDD (Project J) is active; Section B (Cash and working capital) answers have been drafted by AI and inserted into the doc for Brian and Isabel to edit. Parallel operational work includes fixing the RPP collections report (32 active loans/$12.08M) and reconciling 76 prior RPP loans. Bridge facility admin is ongoing, including coordinating interest payments with CIM and internal stakeholders.
